js.category: async function getCategory() { return [ { id: 'rdsj', text: '吃瓜爆料' }, { id: 'whhl', text: '网红黑料' }, { id: 'dyds', text: '短剧影视' } ]; }
js.home: async function getHome(page) { try { const url = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/'; const r = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); const html = await r.text(); const list = []; const regex = /<a\s+href="(\/archives\/\d+\/)"[^>]*>.*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/h2>/gs; let m; while ((m = regex.exec(html)) !== null) { list.push({ vod_id: m[1], vod_name: m[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim(), vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '吃瓜', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } return { page: 1, pagecount: 10, list: list.slice(0, 20) }; } catch(e) { return { page: 1, pagecount: 1, list: [] }; } }
js.detail: async function getDetail(id) { try { const url = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net' + id; const r = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); const html = await r.text(); let title = ''; const t = html.match(/<h1[^>]*class="post-title"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/h1>/); if (t) title = t[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim(); let videoUrl = ''; const v = html.match(/(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:mp4|m3u8)[^"'\s]*)/i); if (v) videoUrl = v[0]; return { vod_id: id, vod_name: title || '51视频', vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: videoUrl ? '在线播放$' + videoUrl : '在线播放$' + url, vod_content: '' }; } catch(e) { return { vod_id: id, vod_name: '51视频', vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: '在线播放$' + url, vod_content: '' }; } }
